name: stylus
identity: A tool used by the healer to make precise markings during ritual procedures, specifically for marking time, breath, and lesion color during the treatment of the afflicted man.
current_status: Being used by Anya to make a single, precise mark across the visible path of the illness as part of the ritual.

volatile_state.current_activity: Marking the time, breath, and color of lesions as part of the ritual
volatile_state.location: Working space around the afflicted man

notes: The stylus is explicitly identified as part of the healer's tools for ritual marking.
